reviews.comment: I would admit, Dr. Bouchat is pretty nice outside of class. Talked to her and love to chat. When doing practice problems for her, it's hard, and I feel like I haven't learned enough. I rely on step-by-step sources that I can read/follow along. But when it comes to exams, points are heavy on hard problems that seem like we've barely or never learned

Idk why there's no reviews of Dr. Bouchat, she's great! Whenever students asked questions she gave explanations that are actually intuitive. I think we had a total of 4 homeworks in the class. The only quibble I have is that perhaps the class was TOO easy and skipped valuable content and/or was too surface-level. One of the best math professors
